title: tragacantha oncotricha
intro: Tragacantha oncotricha, also known as Astragalus oncotrichus, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as improving immune function, reducing stress and anxiety, and protecting against infections. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
